No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly focuses on 'Japanese Teaching Method and Practice', aiming to develop 'ideal Japanese teachers' and 'professional competitiveness', aligning strongly with Targets 4.3, 4.4, and 4.c.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to equip students with 'language skills needed for...work, and professional competitiveness', directly supporting Target 8.5 on productive employment and decent work.
evidence: 生活、工作所需之語言能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course aims to 'cultivate innovation' (Core Competence B), which tangentially relates to Target 9.5, though the focus is pedagogical rather than industrial.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promoting an 'international perspective' and 'cultural understanding' (Core Competence D & C) can indirectly foster inclusion and reduce inequalities between peoples (Target 10.2).
evidence: 知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and 'use legitimate books' is a form of responsible consumption of educational materials, aligning with broader responsible practices.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' supports the rule of law (Target 16.3) and the protection of fundamental freedoms regarding intellectual property (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to global partnerships for sustainable development.
